no-restricted-syntax.message: no-raw-hex: do not hard-code hex colors. Use a design token from packages/design-system/src/tokens.css (e.g. var(--surface-card)) or a Tailwind preset utility (bg-surface-card). A token-with-fallback like var(--token, #hex) is allowed; a bare #hex is not.

no-raw-hex: do not hard-code hex colors. Use a design token from packages/design-system/src/tokens.css (e.g. var(--surface-card)) or a Tailwind preset utility (bg-surface-card). A token-with-fallback like var(--token, #hex) is allowed; a bare #hex is not.
no-bare-palette: do not use raw Tailwind palette utilities (e.g. bg-indigo-600). Use a semantic design-system utility mapped via the Tailwind preset (bg-accent-600, text-fg-2, bg-surface-card).
no-bare-palette: do not use raw Tailwind palette utilities (e.g. bg-indigo-600). Use a semantic design-system utility mapped via the Tailwind preset (bg-accent-600, text-fg-2, bg-surface-card).
voice: product UI copy uses sentence case, second person, no exclamation marks, and no emoji (see CLAUDE.md — Voice & tone). Rewrite the string without '!' or emoji.
voice: user-facing attribute copy (title/placeholder/aria-label) uses sentence case, second person, no exclamation marks, and no emoji (see CLAUDE.md — Voice & tone).
no-bare-palette: do not use raw Tailwind palette utilities. Use a semantic design-system utility mapped via the Tailwind preset.
